---
title: "Building a RAG System I Can Explain"
subtitle: "TU Dublin CPD Certificate in Foundations of AI — Capstone Project"
author: "Alan McDonagh (A00052777)"
date: now
date-format: "DD MMMM YYYY HH:mm"
---

**Published site:** <https://almac09.github.io/private-rag-assistant/>

## About this project

A local Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline built to understand how RAG actually behaves —
where it works, where it fails, and how to evaluate and explain it honestly.

**Stack:** LangChain · ChromaDB · Ollama · RAGAS · Sphinx · Quarto

## Navigation

- [Project Report](report.qmd) — full capstone report
- [Evaluation Results](evaluation.qmd) — RAGAS scores per phase
- [Presentation](presentation.qmd) — slide deck summary
- [Tests](tests.qmd) — test suite and results


## Project phases

| Phase | Goal | Status |
|-------|------|--------|
| 0 | Repo setup + hello world | ✅ Complete |
| 1 | Document ingestion | ✅ Complete |
| 2 | RAG query pipeline | ✅ Complete |
| 3 | Evaluation harness | ⬜ Not started |
| 4 | Feedback + confidence | ⬜ Not started |
| 5 | Enterprise deployment plan | ⬜ Not started |
